summary: The diff shows ServicesPage.tsx has been updated with all 6 service categories, correct sub-items, sample images referenced from /assets/generated/, taglines, and Get a Quote CTA buttons. The implementation appears complete for REQ-1 based on the component code. However, the diff does not show any image files actually added to frontend/public/assets/generated/, which is required by REQ-2.

missing_requirements.requirement: All 6 service category images must be placed in frontend/public/assets/generated/ with the correct filenames.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows 'ADDED FILES: none' and no image files are listed as added to frontend/public/assets/generated/. The ServicesPage.tsx references these images but there is no evidence the actual image files were added to the repository.
